name: Ed Barlow
tagline: Software engineer, database architect, and published author. Building thoughtful systems for complex problems.
home_html:
Current Project: The GAME Framework for Agentic Development

I am combining my Process Based Methodology and scale-proven Technology Rules into a Framework for development that seamlessly enables enterprise capabilities and enables capability sharing within a workgroup (family or team)

The concept is exciting. Contact me if you want to collaborate.

Key Concept: An Agent will conform your code projects. This means adding annotations and new scripts to expose your capabilities of your projects. capability exposure is done with minimal impact. I use an Agent to make all your code look the same.

Key Concept: This can also enforce best practices, your branding, and security and other rules across all your projects

Key Concept: If my Capability Catalog knows how to run everything on your machine, we can advertise those capabilities through our workgroup

Key Concept: Your agents can use these discovered capabilities in an MCP like manner - but from your python with no token

Key Concpet: Might as well give you a full user interface... so i did... Not done but Logging/Monitorng/Scheduling/Verification ...

The GAME Framework contains

  • A Control Panel provides namespaced unified views (namespaced) of your projects.
  • A Capability Catalog to provide capabilities and share resources (transport agnostic: Rest, CLI, Async, MCP)
  • A A Prototyper Workflow with agents providing and ensuring consistent builds
  • Simple Workflow based project management and namespaced project organization
  • Enterprise Operations - Monitoring, Documentation, Scheduled tasks, and Data Flows and Sharing

Hands On Backend Technology Leader at hedge funds, investment banks, insurance companies, and startups

Author, Speaker, Free Software Developer
